description: Standardized role taxonomy for role matching, job classification, and career path logic across post-sale, operations, and product roles.

roles.core_purpose: Resolve basic customer inquiries and issues and maintain customer satisfaction.
core_responsibilities: Respond to customer inquiries via chat, email, or phone
Troubleshoot basic product or service issues
Escalate complex problems to higher support tiers

roles.core_purpose: Resolve customer issues in a B2B or SaaS environment with stronger product and systems exposure.
core_responsibilities: Handle support tickets across email, chat, and phone
Coordinate with internal teams for resolution
Maintain service quality and response times

roles.core_purpose: Resolve complex technical issues and act as the bridge between customers and engineering.
core_responsibilities: Analyze logs, APIs, integrations, and configurations
Document solutions and knowledge base content

roles.core_purpose: Own complex escalations, mentor others, and resolve high-impact technical issues.
core_responsibilities: Partner deeply with engineering and product

roles.core_purpose: Guide new customers through initial setup, education, and early product adoption.
Support customer adoption, satisfaction, and retention in an entry-level customer success capacity.
core_responsibilities: Assist with renewals and retention efforts

roles.core_purpose: Translate customer needs into working product setup, configuration, and go-live execution.
Own end-to-end implementation delivery and ensure successful rollout into customer workflows.
Coordinate complex customer deployment projects from kickoff through implementation and closure.
Drive customer adoption, retention, and long-term value realization.
Own high-value accounts and lead strategic customer outcomes and retention.
Combine technical expertise and account ownership to help customers succeed with complex products.
core_responsibilities: Align product capabilities to business goals

roles.core_purpose: Maintain and grow client relationships with a stronger commercial focus.
Support customers while helping improve experience quality across touchpoints.
core_responsibilities: Collaborate across teams to improve experience

roles.core_purpose: Optimize the end-to-end customer journey and improve customer loyalty through better systems and touchpoints.
core_responsibilities: Analyze NPS, CSAT, and experience data
Partner with marketing, support, and product

roles.core_purpose: Support the sales process by acting as the technical expert in customer conversations and solution design.
core_responsibilities: Translate customer needs into technical solutions

roles.core_purpose: Lead support teams, improve support quality, and manage operational performance.
Manage a team of CSMs and improve customer retention, expansion, and team performance.
Own the customer success function, strategy, and team structure.
core_responsibilities: Partner with sales, product, and support
Manage managers or broader CS org

roles.core_purpose: Build and scale the systems, workflows, metrics, and automation behind the post-sale organization.
core_responsibilities: Build health scores and churn signals

roles.core_purpose: Own the entire post-sale organization, customer outcomes, retention, and expansion strategy.
core_responsibilities: Lead global or company-wide customer success organization
Represent customer voice at the highest level

roles.core_purpose: Drive execution of defined projects by managing timelines, stakeholders, risks, and delivery milestones.
core_responsibilities: Own project execution from kickoff through delivery
Build and manage project plans, timelines, and milestones
Coordinate cross-functional teams and track dependencies
Identify risks, blockers, and delivery gaps
Communicate project status and escalate issues when needed

roles.core_purpose: Lead delivery of technically complex projects by translating business goals into structured execution plans across engineering and business teams.
core_responsibilities: Translate technical requirements into plans, scope, and deliverables
Coordinate engineering, product, infrastructure, and operations stakeholders
Track technical blockers, risks, and dependencies
Drive execution quality across technical workstreams

roles.core_purpose: Coordinate multiple related projects or workstreams to achieve broader strategic business outcomes.
core_responsibilities: Own multi-project program execution and alignment
Coordinate workstreams across multiple teams and stakeholders
Drive program governance, reporting, and execution cadence
Manage risks, dependencies, and strategic tradeoffs across the program
Ensure initiatives stay aligned with broader business goals

roles.core_purpose: Define what should be built and why by aligning user needs, business goals, and product strategy.
core_responsibilities: Own product discovery, prioritization, and roadmap decisions
Translate customer and market needs into product requirements
Partner with design and engineering to deliver product features
Define product success metrics and evaluate outcomes
Align internal stakeholders around product direction and tradeoffs

roles.core_purpose: Own product direction for technically complex products by combining product judgment with strong engineering and systems understanding.
core_responsibilities: Own roadmap and requirements for technically complex product areas
Translate customer and business needs into technically viable product direction
Partner deeply with engineering on architecture, APIs, systems, and tradeoffs
Define success metrics and evaluate technical product outcomes
Support prioritization across technical complexity, user value, and business impact

roles.core_purpose: Improve how product teams operate by optimizing processes, tools, documentation, and operating cadence.
core_responsibilities: Own product team workflows, documentation, and operating processes
Improve intake, sprint operations, release readiness, and cross-team coordination
Maintain planning artifacts, governance frameworks, and team visibility systems
Identify inefficiencies and drive process improvements across product teams
Support tooling, automation, and operational consistency at scale

roles.core_purpose: Turn product and user data into actionable insights that improve product decisions, experiments, and performance.
core_responsibilities: Analyze user behavior, funnels, retention, adoption, and feature performance
Build dashboards, reports, and KPI frameworks for product decision-making
Design and evaluate experiments such as A/B tests
Translate ambiguous product questions into structured analytical approaches
Partner with product, R&D, and business teams to support data-informed decisions

classification_logic.core_rule: Do not classify based on title alone. Classify using responsibilities, keywords, tools, ownership signals, and seniority signals.
